7 // -*- C++ -*-
8 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_FUNCTIONGRAPH_H
9 #define ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_FUNCTIONGRAPH_H
10 /* Author : gaynor at 11/O5/13
11  * Generated by createNew
12  */
13 
14 /*
15  * \ingroup Law
16  * \brief Graphe de fonctions base sur boost
17  *
18  * Les fonctions sont sur les noueds
19  * Les aretes sont des vecteurs de proprietes
20  * Les proprietes racines sont stockees a part
21  *
22  */
23 
24 #include <arcane/utils/ITraceMng.h>
25 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/IFunction.h"
26 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/PropertyVector.h"
27 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/DerivativesMode.h"
28 #include <arcane/utils/TraceAccessor.h>
29 #include <map>
30 #include <list>
31 #include <boost/graph/adjacency_list.hpp>
32 #include <boost/graph/depth_first_search.hpp>
33 #include <boost/tuple/tuple.hpp>
34 #include <arcane/utils/TraceAccessor.h>
35 
36 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
37 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
38 
39 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
40 
41 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
42 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
43 
44 /*
45  * \ingroup Law
46  * \brief Graphe de fonctions base sur boost
47  *
48  */
49 class FunctionGraph
50 {
51 private:
52  // Types sortants
53  typedef std::shared_ptr<IFunction> FunctionPtr;
54  typedef SharedArray<FunctionPtr> FunctionVector;
55  typedef std::map<Property, PropertyVector> DependenciesMap;
56 
58  struct VertexProperty
59  {
60  VertexProperty(FunctionPtr _function) : function(_function){
61  std::string func_id = std::to_string(_function->id());
62  name = "Law[id="+func_id+']';
63  };
64  VertexProperty() {};
65  FunctionPtr function;
66  std::string name;
67  };
68 
70  struct EdgeProperty
71  {
72  EdgeProperty(PropertyVector _linked_properties) : linked_properties(_linked_properties){
73  String out = "["+linked_properties[0].name();
74  for(int i = 1; i < linked_properties.size(); ++i) {
75  out = out+"; " + linked_properties[i].name();
76  }
77  out= out+"]";
78  name = out.localstr();
79  };
80  EdgeProperty() {};
81  PropertyVector linked_properties;
82  std::string name;
83  };
84 
85  // Format du graphe boost direct bidirectionnel
86  typedef boost::adjacency_list<
87  boost::vecS,
88  boost::vecS,
89  boost::bidirectionalS,
90  VertexProperty,
91  EdgeProperty
92  > GraphType;
93 
94  // Types utiles lies au graphe boost
95  typedef boost::graph_traits<GraphType> GraphTraits;
96  typedef GraphTraits::vertex_descriptor VertexType;
97  typedef GraphTraits::adjacency_iterator AdjacencyIterator;
98  typedef GraphTraits::vertex_iterator VertexIterator;
99  typedef GraphTraits::edge_descriptor EdgeType;
100  typedef GraphTraits::edge_iterator EdgeIterator;
101  typedef GraphTraits::in_edge_iterator InEdgeIterator;
102  typedef GraphTraits::out_edge_iterator OutEdgeIterator;
103  //
104  typedef std::list<VertexType> VertexList;
105  typedef std::map<int, VertexList> VerticesMap;
106  typedef std::map<int, VertexType> VertexMap;
107 
109  struct cycle_detector : public boost::default_dfs_visitor
110  {
111  cycle_detector(bool& _has_cycle): has_cycle(_has_cycle){};
112  template <class Edge, class Graph>
113  void back_edge(Edge, Graph&){ has_cycle = true;}
114  private:
115  bool& has_cycle;
116  };
117 
118  public:
119 
120  FunctionGraph(bool fatal_if_unregistered, Arcane::ITraceMng* trace);
121 
122  virtual ~FunctionGraph(){}
123 
125  void add(FunctionPtr f);
126 
128  void replace(FunctionPtr f);
129 
131  inline Integer size() const { return num_vertices(m_graph); }
132 
134  bool hasCycle() const;
135 
137  void checkCycle() const;
138 
140  const FunctionPtr find(Integer i) const;
141 
143  const FunctionPtr find(const Property& p) const;
144 
146  const FunctionPtr end() const { return nullptr; }
147 
149  DependenciesMap computeDependencies(DerivativesMode mode = eDirect) const;
150 
152  FunctionVector toSortVector() const;
153 
155  FunctionVector toSortVector(IntegerConstArrayView idx_output, const bool recursive) const;
156 
158  void printDotGraph(std::ostream& nout) const;
159 
160  private:
161 
163  void _createEdge(const VertexType& in_vertex, const VertexType& out_vertex, const PropertyVector& link);
164 
166  void _addVertexInOutputPropertyMap(const VertexType& new_vertex);
167 
169  void _createAddDownEdge(const VertexType& new_vertex);
170 
172  void _createAddUpEdge(const VertexType& new_vertex);
173 
175  VertexList _sortedVertex() const;
176 
178  void _tagUpVertex(const VertexType& source_vertex, std::vector<bool>& is_find) const;
179 
181  void _deleteSubProperty(IntegerConstArrayView ids, VertexList& sort_vertices, const bool recursive) const;
182 
184  VertexList _computeGraphRootVertex(const VertexList& vertices, const bool is_sort=false) const;
185 
187  void _computeDependencies(const VertexList& sort_vertices, DependenciesMap& dependencies) const;
188 
190  void _dependencies(const VertexType& parent_vertex, DependenciesMap& dependencies, PropertyVector& in_dependencies) const;
191 
193  FunctionVector _toFunctionsVector(const VertexList& vertices) const;
194 
195  // gestion des messages message
197  bool m_fatal_if_unregistered;
199  Arcane::ITraceMng* m_trace;
201  GraphType m_graph;
203  VerticesMap m_free_input_property_to_function_vertices;
205  VertexMap m_output_property_to_function_vertex;
206 };
207 
208 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
209 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
210 
211 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
212

214 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
215 
216 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_FUNCTIONGRAPH_H */
